_readme: This is the ONLY place your real experience lives. The CV tailor engine selects and reorders items from here for each job — it never invents anything not listed here.

summary_variants.general: Software Engineering student (6th semester, Bahria University) with hands-on full-stack development experience across React.js, Next.js, Node.js, and C#/.NET, plus a working internship building production web apps. Comfortable across frontend, backend, and quality assurance work, with a strong grounding in OOP, SOLID principles, and Data Structures & Algorithms.
summary_variants.frontend: Frontend-focused Software Engineering student experienced with React.js, Next.js 15 (App Router), and Tailwind CSS v4. Currently interning as a Frontend Developer, having shipped a production restaurant website and a freelance marketplace platform with reusable component systems and custom React hooks.
summary_variants.backend: Backend-focused Software Engineering student experienced building RESTful APIs with Node.js/Express and C#/.NET, with JWT authentication, MongoDB/SQL Server database design (3NF), and the MVC/BFF architecture patterns. Applies SOLID principles and writes unit-tested, maintainable backend code.
summary_variants.qa: Detail-oriented Software Engineering student with hands-on exposure to API testing, unit testing, and SQL-based data validation. Grounded in STLC/SDLC and Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban, XP). Writes reproducible test cases, validates JSON responses and edge cases with Postman, and tracks defects through to resolution.

skills.name: Manual, API, Regression, Black-Box & White-Box Testing

projects.title: Ember & Oak — Restaurant Website (Internship deliverable)
bullets: Built a full production restaurant website (React + Vite + CSS) with 4 pages, dark/light mode, scroll animations, live menu search, and category filtering
Implemented contact form validation and a Google Maps embed for location display
Developed reusable custom React hooks (useScrollReveal, useCounter) and used Context API for global theme management

projects.title: SkillBridge — Freelance Marketplace Platform (Internship deliverable)
bullets: Built a freelance marketplace platform using Next.js 15 (App Router) and Tailwind CSS v4, including home, services, seller profile, and service detail pages
Deployed the application live on Vercel
Implemented reusable component systems shared across pages for consistent UI

projects.title: TipNinja — Airbnb Clone (MERN Stack)
bullets: Built a marketplace platform with Express.js, EJS, and Tailwind CSS v4 following the MVC design pattern
Implemented dynamic listing features and a secure backend architecture with a fully responsive UI for mobile and desktop
Performed functional and integration testing across user flows including listing creation, session management, and cross-device UI responsiveness
Validated secure JWT authentication workflows by testing authorization headers, token expiry, and role-based access edge cases
Tracked and documented defects found during development, maintaining a defect log with reproduction steps, severity, and resolution status

projects.title: Broker-Free Real Estate Platform (MERN Stack)
bullets: Engineered a scalable property listing platform with CRUD operations, JWT authentication, and role-based access control
Designed RESTful APIs tailored to UI requirements and optimized data fetch speeds across all endpoints
Designed and manually tested RESTful API endpoints for property listings, authentication, and CRUD operations using Postman
Validated JSON response structure, HTTP status codes, and edge-case inputs (empty fields, invalid tokens, duplicate entries) across multiple environments
Identified and resolved data inconsistency issues between frontend requests and backend responses during integration

projects.title: BuildFlow / MarketHub — Multi-Vendor E-commerce & Construction Management Platform
bullets: Developed a multi-vendor e-commerce marketplace and a separate construction management platform using React.js and MongoDB
Focused on state management, real-time data handling, and scalable component architecture

projects.title: Inventory Management System (C# / SQL Server, Desktop Application)
bullets: Engineered a multi-tier management tool applying SOLID principles for modular, maintainable code architecture
Designed a normalized relational database schema (3rd Normal Form) to ensure data integrity and query efficiency for high-frequency transactions
Implemented automated unit tests using NUnit/xUnit basics to verify core business logic including stock calculations and edge cases
Wrote SQL queries to validate data integrity and referential consistency across the schema, and used Postman for endpoint testing

projects.title: Legacy Web Services & System Maintenance (ASP.NET / C#)
bullets: Managed and debugged server-side logic within ASPX pages and ASMX services, ensuring data consistency between legacy frontends and SQL backends
Developed and documented RESTful endpoints to facilitate transition from legacy SOAP services to modern web architectures
Used Postman for request validation and environment-based testing of XML and JSON responses

projects.title: Algorithm & Logic Modules (Python / C#)
bullets: Implemented sorting and searching algorithms with a focus on Time and Space Complexity (Big O)
Automated repetitive data parsing and input/output validation tasks using Python scripts, reducing manual verification effort
Tested algorithm outputs against expected results using assertion-based logic, validating correctness across multiple input sets

experience.title: Frontend Developer Intern — SoftGrid Solutions (2025 – Present)
bullets: Delivered two production applications during the internship: a restaurant website (Ember & Oak) and a freelance marketplace platform (SkillBridge)
Implemented reusable component systems, custom React hooks, and Context API for global theme management across projects
Worked directly within a live production environment, shipping features used by real end users

certifications: Coursera — MERN Stack Development: Dynamic Web Applications (UI/UX, REST APIs, MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js)
Coursera — Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC): Testing phases, QA frameworks
Coursera — C# Programming Fundamentals (OOP, DSA, Test-Driven Logic)
